rationale: Compliance axis activation is non-negotiable when SOC 2 and traceability are in scope
Must distinguish multi-customer from multi-tenant architecture
Domain fit must not override team operational reality in operability scoring
Critical axis = 1 without mitigation must trigger blocking rule
Must not reflexively undervalue simple architectures that fit team and constitution
Available evidence must be used — do not default everything to assumed
Same Fit Band must invoke tiebreaker rule explicitly
Winner must acknowledge a genuine weakness and sacrifice
Brownfield migration requires path reasoning, not just target description
Must activate relevant skills and explicitly exclude irrelevant ones
